How long will it take to make that up even if traffic returns??

data.body:
It's also worth saying that the increasing "pacifist" pronouncements by both Francis and Leo has emerged out of, not in contradiction of, Just War Theory.

The idea is that modern conditions have made the possibilities for just war-making more and more remote to the point of impossibility.
